name: aegis-guardian
description: AEGIS — 5 coordinated AI agents protecting Uniswap V3 LP positions. Guard (IL monitoring), Grow (gas-aware fee compounding via Uniswap Trading API), Rebalance (range drift detection), MEV Shield (sandwich attack detection), Legacy (dead man's switch with ENS). Real on-chain data via web3.py. Lido yield comparison, cross-pool allocation, backtesting. 4 PyVax smart contracts. Sepolia testnet swap execution.

agents.name: guard
agents.role: Threat detection — real-time IL calculation, P&L tracking, auto-exit

agents.name: grow
agents.role: Fee compounding — gas-aware, Uniswap Trading API swap execution

agents.name: rebalance
agents.role: Range monitoring — out-of-range detection, optimal range suggestions

agents.name: mev
agents.role: MEV protection — sandwich/front-run detection, safe swap routing

agents.name: legacy
agents.role: Digital inheritance — dead man's switch, ENS name resolution

tools: web3.py (on-chain reads: slot0, feeGrowthGlobal, gasPrice, liquidity)
Uniswap Trading API (swap quotes + execution via trade-api.gateway.uniswap.org)
Uniswap V3 pool contracts (6 pools: ETH/USDC, ETH/USDT, wstETH/ETH, stETH/ETH)
PyVax (4 smart contracts: Guard Vault, Grow Vault, Legacy Will, MEV Shield)
